summary:
I attempted to use web_data_linkedin_person_profile for both profiles, but the tool returned an authentication error (HTTP 401: Invalid credentials) for each URL, so I couldn’t retrieve the data.

Profiles:
- Ray Lai: https://sg.linkedin.com/in/ray-lai-627aaa239 — fetch failed (401)
- Gabriel Kay: https://sg.linkedin.com/in/gabriel-kay-a76039240 — fetch failed (401)

How would you like to proceed?
- I can retry later if the credential issue is resolved.
- I can use a fallback method (public web search/scraping) to extract just their SUTD education and current role.
- You can paste the relevant profile sections here, and I’ll summarize them.
